SectorAnalysis.description: Structured extraction for a single sector from the day's news.

entities.description: Named companies, organizations, or notable figures mentioned.
entities.title: Entities

sector.description: Sector name from the fixed taxonomy.
sector.title: Sector

sentiment.description: Overall market sentiment for this sector.
sentiment.title: Sentiment

news_category.description: Primary type of news event driving this sector.
news_category.title: News Category

extraction_status.description: 'ok' if full extraction succeeded; 'partial' if evidence was thin.
extraction_status.title: Extraction Status

SectorAnalysis.title: SectorAnalysis

schema.description: Analysis of all relevant sectors found in a single day's news feed.

sectors.description: List of ALL relevant sectors (1–8 max). Only include sectors with clear evidence in the news.
sectors.title: Sectors

schema.title: MultiSectorAnalysis

messages.content:
You are Ava, a sharp trader assistant. Analyze the FULL news feed and extract ALL relevant sectors.

RULES:
- Output ONLY valid JSON matching the schema provided.
- If no sector can be identified, return: {"sectors": []}
- Each sector must use a name from the enum exactly as written.
- Fill ALL required fields for each sector.
- No duplicate sectors. Maximum 8 sectors.
- No extra text outside JSON.

2026-04-29: Fed holds rates steady but with highest level of dissent since 1992: The Federal Reserve on Wednesday released its latest decision on interest rates.. 2026-04-29:  Microsoft earnings are out – here are the numbers: Microsoft is coming off its worst quarterly stock performance since 2008, partly due to broader market concern that AI will eat software. . 2026-04-29: Meta looks to report fastest revenue growth since 2021: In Meta's earnings report after the bell, investors will be monitoring the company's hefty AI spending and whether the war in Iran is having an impact. . 2026-04-29: Brent oil tops $118 after Trump says he will blockade Iran until it agrees to a nuclear deal: The latest move higher comes amid reports that the U.S. will look to extend its blockade of Iranian ports.. 2026-04-29: Alphabet earnings are out — here are the numbers: Alphabet reported first-quarter earnings after the bell Wednesday.. 2026-04-29: Savings rates drop even without Fed cuts. Here’s where you can still earn 4% on your cash: While the Federal Reserve's hold on rate cuts is generally good news for savers, there have already been some banks that have lowered their payouts anyway. . 2026-04-29: Amazon earnings are out – here are the numbers: Amazon reported its first-quarter results after the market close on Wednesday. . 2026-04-29: Ford raises 2026 guidance as $1.3 billion tariff refund assists in offsetting higher costs: Aside from earnings and any changes to the automaker's 2026 guidance, investors will be monitoring effects from the Iran war, tariffs and the pullback in EVs.. 2026-04-29: Chipotle Mexican Grill is about to report earnings. Here's what to expect: Chipotle shares have plummeted 35% over the last year.. 2026-04-29: Jerome Powell says he will continue to serve as a Fed governor, calls Trump criticism 'unprecedented': Powell addressed the question of whether he will stay on as a Board of Governors member after his term as chair ends.. 2026-04-29: Fed holds interest rates steady: Here's what that means for credit cards, mortgages, car loans and savings rates: From mortgage rates to auto loans and credit cards, here’s a look at how the Fed's April interest rate decision may affect your wallet.. 2026-04-29: Trump says it's 'great' that UAE pulled out of OPEC: The UAE has faced repeated missile and drone attacks by Iran, a fellow OPEC member, as it responds to the U.S.-Israeli war.. 2026-04-29: What Wall Street is really looking for in hyperscaler earnings: The path from billions of dollars in capital spending to actual profits is key for investors.. 2026-04-29: Hegseth defends Iran war's mission, costs in first testimony since conflict began: Democratic lawmakers grilled Hegseth about the Iran war in a hearing about the Pentagon's budget.. 2026-04-29: Traders brace for $800 billion in earnings-related stock movement: Wenesday night is the main event for earnings season, with Alphabet, Amazon, Meta and Microsoft – four of the \Magnificent Seven\" — set to report.". 2026-04-29: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square USA fund falls sharply in public market debut: The listing gives public investors their first direct stake in Ackman's investment platform, which runs a concentrated portfolio of 10 large-cap names.. 2026-04-29: Comey will challenge Trump seashells threat indictment as vindictive prosecution, lawyer says: Former FBI Director James Comey has been indicted twice since President Donald Trump regained office. The first case was dismissed by a judge.. 2026-04-29: PayPal's new CEO makes Venmo a standalone business unit as potential buyers circle: PayPal is betting that a new corporate structure can reignite growth at a company that has lost ground to Apple, Google and Stripe in the e-commerce battle. . 2026-04-29: Kalshi bettors called it: Powell says he will stay on as Fed governor after chair term ends: Bettors on the platform don't think Powell will leave until August. If he stays on until then, he'd attend two more meetings of the FOMC. . 2026-04-29: Your bank account could be costing you — try these 6 low- or no-fee options: Your bank account is working against you if you're paying a monthly maintenance fee. That took a toll on refinance demand, but homebuyers seem more resilient.. 2026-04-29: Paramount CEO David Ellison wants to release 30 films annually. History and Hollywood say it's unrealistic: While David Ellison has set a lofty goal for Paramount to release 30 films a year, there's no recent precedent for such a haul.. 2026-04-29: Mortgage rates surge to nearly four-week high as Iran headlines impact markets: Negative headlines on the Iran war pushed bond yields higher, and mortgage rates followed. . 2026-04-29: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: GE HealthCare Technologies, Bloom Energy, Seagate, Teradyne, & more: Here are the stocks making headlines in midday trading.. 2026-04-29: A million-dollar gold bear emerges ahead of the Fed decision: Someone sold upside call exposure in the SPDR Gold ETF (GLD) while simultaneously buying downside put exposure in a two-pronged trade.. 2026-04-29: Trump Fed pick Kevin Warsh clears key Senate hurdle, teeing up final vote: Current Fed Chair Jerome Powell has faced a barrage of criticism from Trump over his refusal to slash interest rates as much as the president wants.. 2026-04-29: Five 'Magnificent Seven' names will post earnings before the week ends. Levels to watch: Frank Cappelleri takes a spin through the technicals in these tech giants ahead of earnings. . 2026-04-29: UAE exit shakes OPEC - But will it really change oil prices?: Amrita Sen, founder and director of market intelligence at Energy Aspects discusses UAE's decision to leave OPEC and how the justification seems intriguing given the oil supply constrain all OPEC members are facing as well. She also discusses how this historic departure does not necessarily come as a surprise and has little impact on the organization's ability to influence oil prices and manage markets.. 2026-04-29: OpenAI looms over earnings from tech hyperscalers: Amazon, Alphabet, Meta and Microsoft report quarterly results after the bell, and OpenAI is likely to be a big topic across the board. . 2026-04-29: Microsoft and Nvidia finally became cheap enough for this value investor – and he plans to buy any dips: Chris Grisanti, chief market strategist at MAI Capital Management, said he bought into the megacaps in the first quarter of the year. . 2026-04-29: Here's everything to expect when the Fed issues its latest interest rate decision Wednesday: In what could be Jerome Powell's final meeting as Fed chair, he and his fellow policymakers are likely to continue their cautious approach.. 2026-04-29: Pentagon AI chief confirms DOD's expanded use of Google, says reliance on one model 'never a good thing': The Pentagon's AI chief discussed the DOD's expanded use of Google Gemini after the blacklisting of Anthropic.. 2026-04-29: Yum Brands earnings top estimates, fueled by Taco Bell's 8% same-store sales growth: Taco Bell's same-store sales increased 8% in the quarter, fueling the company's outperformance.. 2026-04-29: Jet fuel bidding war breaks out as airlines confront ‘global stress test’ over shortages and cancellations: The continent must \fight for every cargo\" in what analysts have dubbed a \"global stress test\" for the airline industry.". 2026-04-29: OpenAI’s subtle drift from Microsoft has become an aggressive move toward Amazon: While OpenAI and Microsoft remain partners, the AI company has been rapidly pushing into Amazon's world. . 2026-04-29: UAE's departure from the OPEC oil cartel is not without precedent.
